clean_story:
Now I will teach you Internet.

Internet is like many smoke signals, but fast—no waiting for wind. You send marks (like handprints on cave wall) to far tribes without running. Others answer back same way, even when sun sleeps. All marks live in big, invisible fire-pit (not hot) that everyone shares. You take what you need, leave what you want—like trading flint but with no hands. If marks move like lightning and many voices talk at once, it is Internet.
